title: Ptychopyxis chrysantha
taxonomy: Ptychopyxis chrysantha is classified as a species within the family Phyllanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Ptychopyxis, which is a group of plants primarily found in Southeast Asia. The family Phyllanthaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, often referred to as the "leafy greens." Members of the Phyllanthaceae family are typically characterized by their small, simple flowers and fleshy leaves. Ptychopyxis chrysantha is a unique species within this family, known for its bright yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape.
